targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS games FROM games
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS games FROM games

targets.queryText: SELECT count(DISTINCT substr(username,1,instr(username||'@','@')-1)) AS players FROM game_players WHERE is_bot = 0
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(DISTINCT substr(username,1,instr(username||'@','@')-1)) AS players FROM game_players WHERE is_bot = 0

targets.queryText: SELECT round((SELECT duration_s FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY duration_s LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT count(*)/2 FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL))/60.0, 1) AS median_min
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT round((SELECT duration_s FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY duration_s LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT count(*)/2 FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL))/60.0, 1) AS median_min

targets.queryText: SELECT round((SELECT duration_s FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY duration_s LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT count(*)*9/10 FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL))/60.0, 1) AS p90_min
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT round((SELECT duration_s FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL ORDER BY duration_s LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT count(*)*9/10 FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL))/60.0, 1) AS p90_min

panels.title: Completion rate
panels.description: % of ended games reaching game over

targets.queryText: SELECT round(100.0 * sum(game_over) / count(*), 1) AS pct FROM games WHERE ended_at IS NOT NULL
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT round(100.0 * sum(game_over) / count(*), 1) AS pct FROM games WHERE ended_at IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Games started per hour
panels.description: every game start the relay saw, hourly

targets.queryText: SELECT (CAST(strftime('%s', started_at) AS INTEGER)/3600)*3600 AS t, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (CAST(strftime('%s', started_at) AS INTEGER)/3600)*3600 AS t, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Active players per hour
panels.description: distinct humans in games started that hour

targets.queryText: SELECT (CAST(strftime('%s', g.started_at) AS INTEGER)/3600)*3600 AS t, count(DISTINCT substr(p.username,1,instr(p.username||'@','@')-1)) AS players FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE g.started_at IS NOT NULL AND p.is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (CAST(strftime('%s', g.started_at) AS INTEGER)/3600)*3600 AS t, count(DISTINCT substr(p.username,1,instr(p.username||'@','@')-1)) AS players FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE g.started_at IS NOT NULL AND p.is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Game length
panels.description: games with a measured duration, minutes

targets.queryText:
SELECT CASE
 WHEN duration_s < 180 THEN '<3'
 WHEN duration_s < 300 THEN '3-5'
 WHEN duration_s < 600 THEN '5-10'
 WHEN duration_s < 900 THEN '10-15'
 WHEN duration_s < 1200 THEN '15-20'
 WHEN duration_s < 1800 THEN '20-30'
 WHEN duration_s < 2700 THEN '30-45'
 WHEN duration_s < 3600 THEN '45-60'
 ELSE '60+' END AS bucket, count(*) AS games,
 min(CAST(duration_s AS INTEGER)) AS ord
 FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY ord
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT CASE
 WHEN duration_s < 180 THEN '<3'
 WHEN duration_s < 300 THEN '3-5'
 WHEN duration_s < 600 THEN '5-10'
 WHEN duration_s < 900 THEN '10-15'
 WHEN duration_s < 1200 THEN '15-20'
 WHEN duration_s < 1800 THEN '20-30'
 WHEN duration_s < 2700 THEN '30-45'
 WHEN duration_s < 3600 THEN '45-60'
 ELSE '60+' END AS bucket, count(*) AS games,
 min(CAST(duration_s AS INTEGER)) AS ord
 FROM games WHERE duration_s IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY ord

targets.queryText: SELECT substr(username,1,instr(username||'@','@')-1) AS player, count(*) AS games FROM game_players WHERE is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT substr(username,1,instr(username||'@','@')-1) AS player, count(*) AS games FROM game_players WHERE is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

targets.queryText: SELECT end_reason, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE end_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT end_reason, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE end_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT format, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE format IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT format, count(*) AS games FROM games WHERE format IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN h = 0 THEN 'bots only' WHEN h = 1 THEN 'solo vs AI' WHEN h = 2 THEN '2 humans' ELSE '3+ humans' END AS mix, count(*) AS games FROM (SELECT g.game_id, count(CASE WHEN p.is_bot = 0 THEN 1 END) AS h FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) GROUP BY g.game_id) GROUP BY mix ORDER BY games DESC
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN h = 0 THEN 'bots only' WHEN h = 1 THEN 'solo vs AI' WHEN h = 2 THEN '2 humans' ELSE '3+ humans' END AS mix, count(*) AS games FROM (SELECT g.game_id, count(CASE WHEN p.is_bot = 0 THEN 1 END) AS h FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) GROUP BY g.game_id) GROUP BY mix ORDER BY games DESC

panels.title: Top commanders
panels.description: true commander picks from deck selections (sparse before 2026-07-06)

targets.queryText: SELECT commander, count(*) AS picks FROM decks WHERE commander IS NOT NULL AND is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT commander, count(*) AS picks FROM decks WHERE commander IS NOT NULL AND is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top decks by games
panels.description: games each deck appeared in (humans; incl. launch archive)

targets.queryText: SELECT deck_name, count(*) AS games FROM game_players WHERE deck_name IS NOT NULL AND is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT deck_name, count(*) AS games FROM game_players WHERE deck_name IS NOT NULL AND is_bot = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

targets.queryText: SELECT c.name, sum(c.count) AS copies, count(DISTINCT c.deck_id) AS decks FROM deck_cards c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 25
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT c.name, sum(c.count) AS copies, count(DISTINCT c.deck_id) AS decks FROM deck_cards c GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Player growth
panels.description: new players by first-seen day (bars) and cumulative total (line)

targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', first_day) AS INTEGER) AS day, count(*) AS new_players, sum(count(*)) OVER (ORDER BY first_day) AS total_players FROM (SELECT substr(p.username,1,instr(p.username||'@','@')-1) AS player, min(date(g.started_at)) AS first_day FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE p.is_bot = 0 AND g.started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(strftime('%s', first_day) AS INTEGER) AS day, count(*) AS new_players, sum(count(*)) OVER (ORDER BY first_day) AS total_players FROM (SELECT substr(p.username,1,instr(p.username||'@','@')-1) AS player, min(date(g.started_at)) AS first_day FROM games g JOIN game_players p USING(game_id) WHERE p.is_bot = 0 AND g.started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
